# FIXTURE PROVENANCE

`manifest.json` `web_accessible_resources[0]` is a verbatim copy of the
CURRENT `gptpowerups-extension` manifest.json (commit `cd954fc`,
`origin/chi/d137-baseline-green`), where `matches` is scoped to the same 3
hosts as `content_scripts.matches` — a widget logo intentionally exposed
cross-site only to the 3 supported hosts, never `<all_urls>`.
